summary: The diff implements nearly all six requirements. REQ-1 through REQ-6 are all addressed: a sound manager hook is created, a DifficultySelector component is added, SinglePlayer Tic Tac Toe gains Minimax AI with difficulty modes, SnakeGame gains speed-based difficulty, TrafficCarGame gains difficulty configs, and SoundToggle is added to all game pages and the Home header. One notable constraint violation exists: the sound manager uses Web Audio API oscillators rather than the HTML5 Audio API as required by the build constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Sound effects must use HTML5 Audio API — no Web Audio API oscillators for these new effects.
missing_requirements.reason: The useSoundManager.ts implementation uses Web Audio API oscillators (AudioContext, OscillatorNode) to generate sounds programmatically, which explicitly violates the build constraint requiring HTML5 Audio API for new sound effects.
